name: Session Reminder
template: Hi {name}! 🏋️ This is a reminder that your {service} is tomorrow at {time}. Location: KOCH Functional Patterns Studio. See you there!

name: Post-Session Follow Up
template: Hi {name}! 💪 How are you feeling after your session? Remember to practice the exercises we worked on. Book your next session: https://koch-fp.com/#booking

name: Appointment Confirmation
template: ✅ Your {service} on {date} at {time} has been confirmed!

name: Welcome Message
template: Hi {name}! 👋 Welcome to KOCH Functional Patterns. We're excited to help you move better and feel stronger. If you have any questions before your session, feel free to reach out!
